## Runtime Contract Snapshot (Current)
render_source_to_svgs(source)
compile_json(source)
compile_json_with_frontend(source, frontend)
schema `puml.compile`
semanticTokens
language_service_json()
schema `puml.languageService`
--dump ast|model|scene
schema `puml.diagnostics`
schema_version: 1
--multi
--dump-capabilities
puml.applyFormat
puml.renderSvg
